title: Threat Landscape
description: Connector for Threat Landscape (threatlandscape.io), a commercial threat intelligence platform delivering continuously updated STIX 2.1 data. Choose from four feed modes: full intelligence (OSINT and darknet combined), OSINT-only, darknet-only, or a vetted actionable IOC feed. The intelligence feeds deliver rich context including threat actors, malware families, campaigns, intrusion sets, vulnerabilities, attack patterns, and their relationships. The IOC feed delivers lean, high-confidence indicators for immediate operationalisation.
short_description: Commercial threat intelligence connector for threatlandscape.io. Ingest full STIX 2.1 intelligence bundles (OSINT, darknet, or combined) or a vetted actionable IOC feed.
